dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track products, monitor alerts, and compare prices across retailers.
dashboard.empty_body_v2: Upload a product or scan an item to begin tracking prices.
alerts.subtitle: Products at or below your target price.
alerts.empty_body: Set target prices on your products to get notified when deals go live.
dashboard.no_search_body: Try a different keyword or clear the search filter.
intel.trend.title: Price trend
intel.trend.headline: Avg. tracked price ${avg_price}
intel.trend.body: Tracking {product_count} products · ${total_savings} total savings vs highest store · {alert_count} at target
intel.trend.empty_body: Add products to see savings trends and deal momentum here.
intel.deals.title: Today's best deals
intel.deals.empty: Add multi-store comparisons to surface your biggest savings here.
intel.ai.title: AI shopping recommendation
intel.ai.empty_headline: Start tracking to unlock AI guidance
intel.ai.empty_body: Upload a photo or add prices — we'll suggest when to buy or wait.
intel.ai.empty_body_event: {event} is in {days} days. Track items now so we can flag likely discounts.
intel.ai.alert_headline: Target price hit — good time to buy
intel.ai.alert_body: {product} is ${price} at {store}, at or below your target.
intel.ai.wait_headline: Consider waiting for the next sale
intel.ai.wait_body: You're tracking {product}. {event} is {days} days away — electronics often drop 10–25%.
intel.ai.deal_headline: Strong savings on a tracked item
intel.ai.deal_body: {product} saves ${savings} vs the highest store — worth comparing before you buy.
intel.ai.track_body: You're tracking {count} products. We'll highlight buy/wait signals as sales approach.
intel.events.title: Upcoming shopping events
intel.events.subtitle: Shopping intelligence — not a holiday calendar
intel.events.watchlist_match: {count} watchlist item(s) may benefit from this event
intel.events.future: Coming soon: historical discount percentages, buy-now vs wait predictions, and watchlist items likely to drop during each event.
events.rec.independence_day: Good window for outdoor gear and big-ticket appliances if you're not in a rush.
events.rec.prime_day: If you're tracking electronics, consider waiting for Prime Day.
events.rec.back_to_school: Laptops and tablets often see their best non-holiday discounts during back-to-school.
events.rec.labor_day: Strong timing for mattresses, appliances, and outdoor furniture.
events.rec.black_friday: Plan ahead for electronics and wearables — set target prices on your watchlist.
events.rec.cyber_monday: Accessories and smaller electronics often beat Black Friday on Cyber Monday.
watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.subtitle: Products you're tracking for the best price.
watchlist.empty_body: Add products from the dashboard to track prices and get alerts when targets are hit.
add.title: Add Product Comparison
add.subtitle: Enter a product price from a store. Add multiple stores with the same product name to compare.
add.target_price_ph: Optional — alert when lowest price hits this
add.target_hint: When the lowest price is at or below this target, the dashboard shows an Alert status.
edit.title: Edit Product
edit.subtitle: Update product details and store prices.
edit.delete_confirm: Delete {name} and all store prices? This cannot be undone.
upload.title: Upload Product Photo
upload.subtitle: Upload a photo of the product. You'll confirm the name on the next step.
upload.drop_hint: PNG, JPG, GIF, or WebP — max 5 MB
upload.ai_note: After upload, Gemini Vision will analyze your photo and suggest the product name, brand, and model. You can review and edit before saving.
confirm.title: Confirm Product Name
confirm.subtitle: Review AI detection results and confirm the product name.
confirm.ai_hint_identified: The product name field below has been auto-filled. Edit it if needed.
confirm.ai_hint_manual: We couldn't identify this product from the photo. Please enter the name manually below.
confirm.autofill_hint: Auto-filled from AI detection — adjust if the suggestion isn't quite right.
confirm.manual_hint: Enter the product name manually to continue.
confirm.suggestions_hint: Tap a suggestion to use it as the product name.
search.title: Auto Price Search
search.subtitle: Comparing online prices so you don't have to guess.
search.zip_placeholder: Enter ZIP code for delivered price
search.zip_required: Enter your ZIP code once — we'll remember it for future price searches.
search.demo_notice: Demo prices only — real retailer API integration coming soon.
search.no_results: No sample results for this product.
search.listing_marketplace_note: Sold by a third-party seller — verify product title and pack size.
search.listing_outlier_note: Price is much higher than other retailers — may be the wrong item or seller.
filter.retailers_desc: Show prices only from selected stores. Your choices are saved in this browser.
filter.no_results: No results match your retailer filter. Select at least one store above.
validation.abnormal_high: Price is unusually high for this product category.
validation.abnormal_low: Price is unusually low — may be a different item or used/refurbished.
pickup.title: Pickup locations
pickup.enter_zip_body: Enter your ZIP code to see nearby pickup locations.
pickup.reserve_disabled: Demo only — reservation coming with retailer API integration
pickup.demo_notice: Demo pickup locations — real retailer inventory and pickup availability will be connected through retailer APIs in a future version.
pickup.future_note: Coming soon: live inventory, estimated pickup time, and real-time availability from retailer APIs based on your ZIP code.
pickup.errors.missing_info: Missing pickup details. Please try again from price search.
pickup.errors.no_pickup: This retailer does not support in-store pickup in Price Pilot.
variants.title: Choose model details
variants.subtitle: Pick the exact series, size, and options so prices match what you want.
variants.select_hint: Defaults are pre-selected — adjust any option, then search prices.
variants.preview_placeholder: Select options above to build your search
variants.errors.required: Please select an option in each section.
variants.errors.invalid_profile: Could not load model options for this product.
landing.page_title: Price Pilot — AI-Powered Price Comparison & Watchlist
landing.meta_description: Compare total delivered prices, track your watchlist, get deal alerts, and identify products with AI — built with Python, SQLite, and Gemini Vision.
landing.hero_sub: Log total delivered prices across stores, track items on your watchlist, set deal alerts, and let Gemini Vision identify products from a photo — all in one dashboard.
landing.tech_stack: Built with Python · SQLite · Gemini Vision
landing.features_title: Everything you need to buy smarter, not harder
landing.features_sub: Compare real costs, track your watchlist, and get alerted when the deal is right — powered by Python, SQLite, and Gemini Vision.
landing.feature1_body: Log item price plus shipping per store. The dashboard surfaces the lowest total cost — not just the sticker price.
landing.feature2_body: Star products you care about. Monitor target price, lowest price, store, and status — with one-click Buy Now links.
landing.feature3_body: Upload a photo and Gemini Vision suggests the product name, brand, and model. Review and confirm before tracking.
landing.feature4_body: Set a target price and get an instant Alert badge when any store drops to your goal — on the dashboard and watchlist.
landing.feature5_body: Find products instantly and sort by price, name, or last updated date across your full comparison list.
landing.feature6_body: See average savings and per-product spreads when you compare the same item across multiple retailers.
landing.how_title: Three steps to a smarter purchase
landing.how_sub: Add prices, compare total delivered cost, and get alerted when it's time to buy.
landing.step1_body: Enter store, URL, and total delivered price — or upload a photo for Gemini Vision to suggest the product name.
landing.step2_body: Add the same product from other retailers. Price Pilot groups entries and highlights the lowest price per item.
landing.step3_body: Set a target price, star items on your watchlist, and buy when the Alert badge shows your deal is live.
landing.pricing_sub: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.
landing.plan_pro_desc: For power shoppers and small teams.
landing.plan_business_desc: For teams and resellers at scale.
landing.contact_sub: Have a question, feature request, or want to discuss Business pricing? We'd love to hear from you.
landing.footer_tagline: Compare delivered prices. Track your watchlist. Buy with confidence.
landing.footer_copy: © 2026 Price Pilot · Built with Python, SQLite & Gemini Vision
errors.price_min: Price must be zero or greater.
errors.price_invalid: Price must be a valid number.
errors.target_min: Target price must be zero or greater.
errors.target_invalid: Target price must be a valid number.
errors.invalid_product_url: Enter a real retailer product page URL (not a placeholder or search link).
errors.search_track_required: Missing price details. Please try again.
flash.contact_success: Thanks for reaching out! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
flash.not_on_watchlist: Product is not on your watchlist.
flash.select_image: Please select an image to upload.
flash.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Use PNG, JPG, GIF, or WebP.
flash.image_too_large: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
flash.ai_identified: Product identified by AI. Review and confirm the name.
flash.ai_auto_confirmed: Photo saved for "{name}" — searching prices now.
flash.ai_not_identified: Could not identify the product. Please enter the name manually.
flash.enter_product_name: Please enter a product name to continue.
flash.photo_saved: Product confirmed: "{name}". Choose model details or search prices next.
flash.tracked_with_photo: Added {product} at {store} with your scan photo.
delete.confirm_body: This will remove this product and its associated price history only. This action cannot be undone.
flash.delete_failed: Could not delete that product. Please try again.
flash.zip_saved: ZIP code saved — future searches will use {zip}.
flash.invalid_zip: Please enter a valid 5-digit ZIP code.
settings.notifications_subtitle: Choose what you want to hear about — delivery coming soon.
settings.notifications_desc: We'll use these preferences when browser push alerts launch.
settings.notif_price_drops_desc: When a tracked item hits your target or drops significantly.
settings.notif_back_in_stock_desc: When a watched item is available again.
settings.notif_weekly_digest_desc: A weekly summary of the best deals on your watchlist.
settings.notif_shopping_events_desc: Reminders before Prime Day, Black Friday, and similar events.
settings.browser_push_desc: Enable push alerts in your browser. Sending is not live yet — this sets up your preferences.
settings.notif_status_denied: Notifications blocked — enable them in browser settings.
assistant.page_subtitle: Configure how your AI shopping assistant alerts you — saved locally for now.
assistant.hero_desc: Choose whether alerts follow the products you track, your favorite stores, or both. We'll use these preferences when notifications launch.
assistant.dashboard_cta: Set alert mode, delivery preferences, and shopping event reminders for your personal assistant.
assistant.saved: Assistant preferences saved to this browser.
assistant.alert_mode_desc: Should alerts follow products, stores, or both?
assistant.mode_products_desc: Price drops & stock on items you track
assistant.product_alerts_desc: Notifications tied to items on your watchlist or dashboard.
assistant.store_alerts_desc: Deals and promotions from retailers you care about.
assistant.delivery_prefs_desc: Filter alerts by how you prefer to receive orders.
assistant.ai_alerts_desc: Let AI nudge you when to buy or wait — not active yet.
assistant.push_desc: Optional browser permission for when push delivery goes live. No messages are sent yet.
assistant.opt_ai_buy_now_desc: When our model thinks it's a good time to purchase.
assistant.opt_ai_wait_desc: When prices may drop or a sale is likely soon.
home.title: Home
home.headline: What should you buy today?
home.subheadline: Scan a product, compare prices, and let your assistant find the best deal.
home.no_comparisons: No comparisons yet — scan your first product.
home.notifications_desc: Configure alerts in Profile or enable browser notifications.

scan.subtitle: Find the best price with a photo or product name.
scan.upload_photo_desc: AI identifies the product from your camera roll.
scan.camera_desc: Point your camera at any product in store.
scan.search_by_name_desc: Type a product name to compare prices instantly.
scan.barcode_desc: Scan a UPC for instant price lookup.
compare.title: Compare prices
compare.subtitle: Track products and see the best delivered price across retailers.
compare.empty_body: Scan or add a product to start comparing retailer prices.
compare.shipping_note: Prices include shipping where shown — best delivered price highlighted.
watchlist.price_history_soon: Price history charts coming soon — track trends over time.
profile.push_desc: Browser permission only — no messages sent yet.
profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account, location, and assistant preferences.
profile.zip_desc: Used for delivered price and pickup estimates.
profile.about_desc: Learn how we help you save.
profile.feedback_desc: Tell us what you'd like to see next.
ds.title: Design System
ds.subtitle: Shared tokens and components for a consistent Price Pilot experience.
ds.brand_product_note: Compact header — icon and name only. Used on all in-app pages.
ds.brand_marketing_note: Full banner with AI badge, tagline, and feature icons. Used on the website and promotional materials.
ds.profile_link_desc: Colors, typography, buttons, and navigation reference.
ds.nav_note: Bottom tab bar is the primary navigation on all screen sizes.
compare.select_product_hint: Switch products to refresh live retailer prices.
scan.camera_active_desc: Tap to open your camera — works on mobile devices.
